highlights.text: I wrote Friday at 4pm: “My general lean is always just to defer to the trend.
Institutions buy dips via Failed Breakdowns.
Last week aftetr FOMC, multiple institutions took an enormous long position and we saw it on the chart via a massive Failed Breakdown.

In today’s newsletter I’ll talk this, I’ll do a deep dive into a powerful Failed Breakdown we had last Thursday morning that provided a secondary entry for those who missed last Wednesday’s FOMC Day long.
We get 1 Failed Breakdown per day on average, and you need to learn to spot them.

post_title: First Dip For SPX In A Week. Another Insta-Buy, or More Red Ahead? Sept 24th Plan
